title: Datasource component: Confluence spec to offline plan and TSX scaffold
query: Provision the Related Content Card from its Confluence functional spec — draft the manifest, run the offline plan, and give me the scaffold. Do not push yet.
expected_behavior: Resolves the provisioning config from build.config.json under the sitecoreProvisioning key before drafting anything.
Fetches the Confluence spec through the Atlassian MCP and extracts the field inventory from the spec's field tables.
Writes a manifest with a datasource-role template plus its base template, then runs the CLI plan mode offline against it.
Surfaces the drafted manifest, the written slug plan JSON, the emitted TSX pair paths, and any review questions as one plan artifact.
Emits the datasource-mode TSX pair create-only and stops at plan plus scaffold without any online call.
must_not: Run check or push, or make any online CMS call during an offline plan.
Draft the manifest from memory when the spec is available to fetch.
gap: Protects the offline spec-to-plan path so datasource provisioning stays plan-plus-scaffold only and never reaches online modes unbidden.
